name: Dan
goal: Dan wants to suggest a holiday destination that combines vibrant cultural experiences with opportunities for hiking and outdoor exploration to create an unforgettable celebration for Chris.
backstory: Dan has just returned from a thrilling backpacking trip across Europe and is eager to plan another adventure with his friends. He's been friends with Chris since college and has always been the one to suggest spontaneous road trips or outdoor activities. Dan's personal preference is for destinations that offer a mix of culture, history, and adrenaline-pumping experiences.

focus_notes.cost: For Dan, cost is a secondary consideration - he's willing to splurge on experiences that will create lifelong memories, but also understands the importance of budgeting.
focus_notes.comfort: Dan prioritizes comfort in terms of having access to basic amenities, but is also happy to rough it if it means experiencing something unique or exciting.
focus_notes.time: Time is of the essence for Dan - he wants to make the most of their holiday and pack in as many activities and experiences as possible.
focus_notes.safety: While Dan is adventurous, he's not reckless - he'll prioritize safety when choosing activities or destinations, especially if they involve high-risk sports or traveling to unfamiliar areas.
focus_notes.flexibility_focus: Dan values flexibility in terms of being able to change plans or try new things on a whim, but also understands the importance of having some structure and planning in place.
